title: Bulk Add Guests to a Board
excerpt:
It would be highly beneficial to have the capability to add multiple users in bulk. 
At the moment, inviting new users requires entering each email individually, which can be a time-consuming and tedious process.

posts.author: kyle.fuertes (Kyle Fuertes)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be highly beneficial to have the capability to add multiple users in bulk.

At the moment, inviting new users requires entering each email individually, which can be a time-consuming and tedious process.

posts.author: zhusein (Zubir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is this the capability you are looking for? Inviting users via API to a Monday account was recently added in February:

monday.com Platform API

New invite_users mutation

You can now invite users to join a monday.com account using the new invite_users mutation. This is available in API versions 2025-04 and later. mutation { invite_users (emails: ["test@monday.com", "test2@monday.com"], product: crm, user_role:...
